nl_query: Which faculty members have prepared answer keys for papers where they are also assigned as the board coordinator, creating a potential conflict of interest?
failed_sql:
SELECT fc.employee_id, fc.name AS preparer_name, bc.employee_id AS board_coordinator_employee_id, bc.name AS board_coordinator_name
FROM   faculty_cache fc
JOIN   answer_key_preparer akp ON akp.employee_id = fc.employee_id
JOIN   answer_key ak ON ak.id = akp.answer_key_id
JOIN   board_coordinator bc ON bc.employee_id = akp.employee_id
JOIN   board b ON b.id = ak.qp_id
WHERE  ak.status = 'APPROVED'
  AND  bc.status = 'APPROVED'
  AND  fc.is_active = TRUE
  AND  bc.is_active = TRUE
ORDER  BY fc.employee_id, bc.employee_id;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): board_coordinator.is_active, board_coordinator.status, board_coordinator.name, board_coordinator.is_active, board_coordinator.status. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
